  • Class
    Description
    CachedProofBranch
    Data object about a cached proof branch.
    CachingException
    Helpful error message used when the proof cache cannot be applied successfully.
    CachingExtension
    Extension for proof caching.
    CachingExtension.CopyBeforeDispose
    Listener that ensures steps are copied before the referenced proof is disposed.
    CachingPruneHandler
    Handles prunes in proofs that are referenced elsewhere.
    DefaultReferenceSearchDialogListener
    The default controller for the ReferenceSearchDialog.
    ReferenceSearchButton
    Status line button to indicate whether cached goals are present.
    ReferenceSearchDialog
    Dialog showing reference search information.
    ReferenceSearchDialogListener
    Interface to receive callbacks from the ReferenceSearchDialog.
